name: colab-ml-preflight
description: Preflight checks, monitoring, and triage for ML notebook runs on Google Colab.
tagline: Stop losing training runs to Colab disconnects and silent failures.
author: Sai Sumanth Battepati

skills.name: build
skills.trigger: Constructing or authoring an ML notebook for Google Colab execution

skills.name: check
skills.trigger: Before running a notebook on Google Colab

skills.name: launch
skills.trigger: Deploying a notebook to Google Colab via Drive or GitHub

skills.name: monitor
skills.trigger: After starting a Colab notebook, while it is executing

skills.name: blackbox
skills.trigger: After a Colab notebook failure — runtime crash, disconnect, or error

skills.name: handbook
skills.trigger: On-demand reference for Colab rules, case studies, and glossary
